stemHtml:
Given the following NOTAM information, what Standard Instrument Departure procedure is affected by the mentioned changes?

>>> EDDF FRANKFURT MAIN <<< NEW TODAY TWY P1 BTN TWY P AND TWY DP1 CLSD.: NOTAM ED/A0714/16 RWY 25L TDZ SLIPPERY WHEN WET.: NOTAM ED/A0588/16 BIBTI 1H: INITIAL DEPARTURE DESCRIPTION SHOULD READ AS FOLLOWS: ON RWY TRACK TO 5.1 DME FFM/2.1 DME FRD, LT MAX IAS 185 KT UNTIL ESTABLISHED INBOUND VFM DIRECT VFM, ON TRACK 195DEG TO 10.1 DME FFM. GPS/FMS RNAV: DF235 A800+, L DF171 K185 DF172 A2500+, R PABVI R & SIVDO-R KUPIP R MASIR-R RAVKI DITAML OBOKA BIBTI. WAYPOINT DF235 STILL REMAINS FLY OVER WAYPOINT. >>> END OF BULLETIN <<<
